title: GUI Control Reference — EPSON RC+ SPEL+
instruction: References in this folder describe GUI form properties and events used with GSet / GGet in SPEL+. Use ONLY when the task involves building an RC+ operator interface: forms, buttons, labels, text boxes, list boxes, combo boxes, check boxes, radio buttons, progress bars, grids, sliders, timers, and image/video controls. Do NOT use these for robot motion, I/O, or SPEL+ program-flow commands.
